differential_diagnoses: Portal hypertensive biliopathy leading to hemobilia
Portal vein stenosis/thrombosis due to prior biliary reconstruction
next_steps: Biliary tree visualization via endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP)
Liver biopsy of the abnormal perihilar enhancing region
Interventional radiology consultation for potential portal vein stenting or decompression
Surgical consultation for management of biliary sequelae and portal hypertension
